overview.description: Solo AI coaching and consulting service building personalized AI stacks for C-level executives
overview.description_long: koučka.ai (AI Kočka) is a one-person AI consulting practice run by Dita Eckhardtová, targeting CEOs and senior executives. The service offers a deep intake session to map the client's working style and decision-making patterns, then builds a private AI stack of custom agents, automations, and workflows — including daily briefings, weekly summaries, and personalized tools. Packages include a one-time AI System Setup (20,000 CZK / €1,500) and a monthly Private AI Retainer (15,000 CZK / €1,000/month, max 5 clients). Eckhardtová is also a co-organizer of the Prague AI Monday community events and a published author on time management.
overview.tagline: Tvůj soukromý AI mozek (Your private AI brain)

history.origin_story: Founded by Dita Eckhardtová, a former ghostwriter for CEOs and top executives, who pivoted from building personal brands on LinkedIn to building AI infrastructure for the same clientele. She co-organizes the Prague AI Monday community and is the author of a book on time management.

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: The core service — helping executives set up AI tools and workflows — is highly susceptible to commoditization as AI platforms become easier to use and self-service. There is no proprietary technology, data moat, or defensible IP; the value is entirely in personal expertise and time.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Demand for executive AI coaching is real and growing, but the market is fragmented with many freelancers and boutique consultants offering similar services. Capped at 5 clients by design, limiting scale and revenue ceiling.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Solo freelancer operation with no external funding, no team, and revenue entirely dependent on retaining a handful of individual clients. No runway buffer and highly vulnerable to client churn.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: A one-person consultancy with high AGI displacement risk (no proprietary tech), high funding risk (no backing, minimal scale), and a model capped at 5 clients. Personally sustainable for the founder but structurally fragile as a catalogued company.

metadata.notes: This is a solo consultant brand ('AI Kočka' / 'koučka.ai') operated by Dita Eckhardtová. Contact: dita.eckhardtova@gmail.com, +420 727 961 319. Co-organizer of AI Monday Prague. No CNAIP entry found. No Glassdoor presence (too small). Maximum client count self-described as 5 at a time.
